title: Bamboo Fragranced Room Spray (Pomegranate & Pepperwood)
features: Juicy pomegranate, layered with rich patchouli and warmed with spicy pepper to create a subtle and sensual aroma.
description: Fragranced room sprays exude simple, yet sophisticated elegance with a unique shape and attractive frosted glass bottle with gold chromed lids. Designed for smaller rooms where a quick spray brings instant freshness in a choice of irresistible scents. If eco-friendly is part of your lifestyle choice then Bamboo room sprays are the perfect alternative to the pressurised aerosol versions which can be harsher on the environment. Also, being primarily water-based, our sprays can be used to freshen up fabrics - stylish and sustainable - the perfect combination! Fragrance time: over 1500 sprays Content: 90ml
